prompts.name: avioes_de_guerra_livre
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional photography
Battlefield in winter landscape: A frozen tundra illuminated by the setting sun casting long, dark shadows over a vast array of military equipment. An F-15E Eagle fighter jet sits on the snowy runway, its metallic surface reflecting the last rays of daylight. Snow-caked armored vehicles and artillery pieces dot the landscape, their matte gray and green hues contrasting sharply with the pristine white snow. A helicopter hovers overhead, its rotors cutting through the crisp winter air, while infantry soldiers move purposefully in the distance, bundled against the cold. The atmosphere is tense yet controlled, a testament to the combat readiness and strategic operations of the aviões de guerra em combate no paisagem invernal. Sony A7R V, 400mm f/2.8, f/4, ISO 400, ultra realistic, National Geographic

prompts.name: avioes_de_guerra_livre_2
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional photography
Nighttime cityscape with military plane: A sprawling metropolis bathed in a soft blue-gray glow of artificial lights, silhouettes of towering skyscrapers piercing through the inky black night sky. In the foreground, a state-of-the-art fighter jet, its metallic surface glistening with a mix of reflected city lights and the faint radiance of distant searchlights, sits poised for takeoff on an isolated runway within the heart of the city, casting long shadows that dance across the asphalt. The atmosphere is tense yet controlled, the air thick with anticipation. A subtle haze of exhaust fumes adds a layer of grit and realism to the scene, while intricate details of the military aircraft's sleek design stand out against the dark backdrop. The composition is carefully balanced between the sprawling cityscape and the imposing war machine, creating an image that encapsulates the themes of military might, aerial power, warfare machinery, airborne action, strategic operations, combat readiness, defense technology, and mobilization of forces. Sony A7R V, 24mm f/1.4, f/2, ISO 3200, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: avioes_de_guerra_livre_3
prompts.text:
Analog film photograph, professional photography

Aircraft carrier deck at dusk under a stormy sky, USS Nimitz or similar, San Diego Bay, California. The carrier is bathed in a mix of harsh artificial light from its towering structures and the soft, muted tones of the setting sun filtering through heavy clouds. A F/A-18 Super Hornet sits at the edge of the runway, its jet engine glowing like molten silver against the weathered gray deck. The aircraft carrier's massive structure casts long shadows on slick metal surfaces and shiny jet engines, creating a sense of imposing power and readiness. The atmosphere is tense but controlled, with military personnel in bright orange fire-fighting gear standing at attention nearby, ready for action. The scene captures the strategic operations, combat readiness, defense technology, mobilization of forces, and aerial power that define the avioes_de_guerra category, while showcasing the unique textures, colors, and compositional elements of an aircraft carrier deck under stormy conditions. Hasselblad medium format, Kodak Portra 400 film scan, ultra realistic, National Geographic.
